texts.label: text
texts.orig: MID SEASON: 02 nd  January to 31 st March -01 st Oct-31  1st  2025
texts.text: MID SEASON: 02 nd  January to 31 st March -01 st Oct-31  1st  2025

texts.label: text
texts.orig: to 5 th  September; 23 rd  December 2025 - 01 st January 2026
texts.text: to 5 th  September; 23 rd  December 2025 - 01 st January 2026

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ground Package: Single room supplement @ $100 Low/Mid/Green and $150 high season. Child rate 75 % with 2 adults sharing. Included: Keekorok airstrip transfers or Sekenani gate, full board accommodation, shared game
texts.text: Ground Package: Single room supplement @ $100 Low/Mid/Green and $150 high season. Child rate 75 % with 2 adults sharing. Included: Keekorok airstrip transfers or Sekenani gate, full board accommodation, shared game

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Children under 4 years sharing a room with 2 adults will be accommodated FREE. 4 yrs.-11Yrs old sharing with 2 Adults at 50% adult Rate
texts.text: Children under 4 years sharing a room with 2 adults will be accommodated FREE. 4 yrs.-11Yrs old sharing with 2 Adults at 50% adult Rate

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Children in own room are charged 75% of the per person adult rate
texts.text: Children in own room are charged 75% of the per person adult rate

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Christmas Supplements 24 th  ,25 th ,26 th ,31 st 1 st  /Easter Supplements : Good Friday- Easter Sunday US$ 10.00 PPPN OR 1000/=
texts.text: Christmas Supplements 24 th  ,25 th ,26 th ,31 st 1 st  /Easter Supplements : Good Friday- Easter Sunday US$ 10.00 PPPN OR 1000/=

texts.label: text
texts.orig: * Honeymooners package @40 Per room, bottle of bubbly, fruits and flowers * Sundowner on the Hills with canapes @40 PP Min 4 Pax * Bush Breakfast @ 40PP Min 4 Pax * Bush dinner @ 40 PPS   Min 4 Pax * Nature Walk @ 25 PPS

texts.text: *Denotes: subject to weather condition and number of guests

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 3.1 To reserve and confirm space on any trip, the Camp requires a deposit of 30% of the total amount of the invoice.
texts.text: 3.1 To reserve and confirm space on any trip, the Camp requires a deposit of 30% of the total amount of the invoice.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: An advance payment of 30% as a deposit is due within 10 days from the date of the Camp's Pro forma invoice.
texts.text: An advance payment of 30% as a deposit is due within 10 days from the date of the Camp's Pro forma invoice.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Camp recommends early reservations in order to guarantee accommodation to our esteemed clients on the dates they plan to travel.
texts.text: The Camp recommends early reservations in order to guarantee accommodation to our esteemed clients on the dates they plan to travel.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.2 The balance of 70% of the invoice amount is due for payment within 30 days prior to the date of arrival. In the unfortunate event that the 70% of the invoice amount is not paid within the stipulated time, Osero Enarau Camp Masai Mara reserves the right to treat the reservation as cancelled.
texts.text: 3.2 The balance of 70% of the invoice amount is due for payment within 30 days prior to the date of arrival. In the unfortunate event that the 70% of the invoice amount is not paid within the stipulated time, Osero Enarau Camp Masai Mara reserves the right to treat the reservation as cancelled.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Guests Check-in: 1230hrs (on the booked arrival date)
texts.text: Guests Check-in: 1230hrs (on the booked arrival date)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Guests Check-out: 1000hrs (late check outs will be charged)
texts.text: Guests Check-out: 1000hrs (late check outs will be charged)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All terms and conditions of this Contract are confidential between Camp and the Agent and no information regarding the content of this contract may be divulged to third parties without a written authorization from the Camp.
texts.text: All terms and conditions of this Contract are confidential between Camp and the Agent and no information regarding the content of this contract may be divulged to third parties without a written authorization from the Camp.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This Contract is valid until 1 st  January 2026
texts.text: This Contract is valid until 1 st  January 2026

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of unavoidable circumstances that warrant any changes in respect to terms and conditions of this agreement such changes shall be notified in writing to the aggrieved party.
texts.text: In the event of unavoidable circumstances that warrant any changes in respect to terms and conditions of this agreement such changes shall be notified in writing to the aggrieved party.
